edge_hypothesis: MACD histogram zero-line cross is our most consistent signal family (9 ACCEPTs, best PF=1.712). ALL existing MACD variants use EMA_50 as trend confirmation. VWAP_D (daily Volume-Weighted Average Price) is computed every bar but NEVER tested — it represents where the 'real money' traded on the session. Hypothesis: VWAP incorporates volume information that pure price MAs miss. When MACD flips bullish AND close is above VWAP, both momentum AND volume-weighted fair value agree the move is genuine. If this outperforms MACD+EMA_50, it proves volume adds confirmation value — opening a new confirmation family. If it underperforms, EMA_50 remains superior and we can deprioritize VWAP. Either outcome is informative. This is the first-ever strategy using VWAP in our system.
target_regime: transitional (MACD histogram flip detects momentum shift) + trending continuation (VWAP confirmation aligns with session bias)

variants.name: macd_vwap_momentum_8to1
variants.description: MACD histogram crosses zero confirmed by close vs VWAP_D at 8:1 R:R. Direct A/B test against MACD+EMA_50 (our control). Uses proven MACD 7:1 family geometry but with VWAP replacing EMA_50. Stop 1.5 ATR matches the MACD family baseline.

components.notes: MACDh_12_26_9 zero-line cross — proven momentum signal with 9 ACCEPTs
VWAP_D — daily volume-weighted average price. NEVER TESTED. Replaces EMA_50 as trend confirmation.

variants.name: macd_vwap_tight_10to1
variants.description: MACD histogram crosses zero confirmed by close vs VWAP_D at 10:1 R:R with tighter stop (1.0 ATR). Matches Vortex v3a geometry. Tests whether the tighter stop that worked for Vortex also works for MACD+VWAP — the theory being that volume-confirmed entries have higher conviction and need less breathing room.

components.notes: VWAP_D — volume-weighted trend confirmation replacing EMA_50
